key.name: user-session-cookie
key.description: The value of the user_session cookie from github.com. Extract it from your browser's DevTools (Application tab → Cookies → github.com → user_session). Required to authenticate with the GitHub Copilot entitlement endpoint.

key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to poll the GitHub entitlement endpoint for updated usage data. Minimum 5 minutes, maximum 1440 (24 hours).

key.name: usage-history
key.description: JSON-serialised snapshot history used to derive daily consumption, running averages, and quota-exhaustion projections. Managed automatically by the extension; editing by hand is not recommended. Rolling window of up to 90 days across billing periods.
